text.title: Blameless Postmortem Facilitation Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of blameless-postmortem-facilitation. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Postmortem reads 'Sam failed to escalate'; team learns to hide near-misses.
antipattern.root-cause: No language lint; facilitator was the responder's manager.
antipattern.fix: Run language lint; rotate facilitator to a non-stake holder.

antipattern.symptom: Report ends 'root cause: a faulty deploy'; no contributing-factor tree.
antipattern.fix: Mandate ≥3 contributing factors; reject single-root drafts.

antipattern.symptom: Action items lack owner / deadline / verifier; 90 days later, none done.
antipattern.fix: Schema requires owner + deadline + verifier; weekly action-item review.
